summary: Multi-currency support verified across Dashboard, Analytics, POS, Sales pages. Fixed critical bug in SuperAdminDashboard.js (missing DollarSign import). All currency features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: SuperAdminDashboard.js line 1236 used DollarSign without import - replaced with CurrencyIcon component
Good: CurrencyContext properly persists displayCurrency to localStorage
Good: formatCurrency function correctly formats amounts with locale-specific symbols and formatting (€0,00 for EUR, $0.00 for USD)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-currency support is fully functional across all financial pages. CurrencyIcon component is used for dynamic currency icons. Currency selector is on Dashboard page with data-testid='currency-selector-btn'.

features_tested.currency_selector_on_dashboard: PASSED - Globe icon button opens dropdown with all 17 currencies
features_tested.dashboard_displays_correct_currency: PASSED - Today Revenue shows €0,00 when EUR selected
features_tested.analytics_page_currency: PASSED - Market Analytics shows €0,00 Total Sales with EUR symbol
features_tested.pos_page_currency: PASSED - Product prices show in EUR (€40,00, €299,00, €120,00)
features_tested.sales_page_currency: PASSED - Total Revenue €21.310,00 and all amounts in EUR
features_tested.currency_persistence_localStorage: PASSED - displayCurrency=EUR persists after page reload
features_tested.currency_change_toast_notification: PASSED - 'Currency changed to Euro' toast appears
features_tested.multiple_currency_switching: PASSED - Successfully switched between INR, EUR, USD

bug_fixed.fix: Replaced <DollarSign> with <CurrencyIcon> component which was already imported
bug_fixed.root_cause: DollarSign icon was used but not imported from lucide-react. The code should use the dynamic CurrencyIcon component for multi-currency support.

screenshots: .screenshots/11_sales_page.png - Sales History with €21.310,00 total revenue and all amounts in EUR
